productDisplayName: Lee Men's Medal Blue Lapis T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline and multi-coloured twill tape in-seam, half sleeves and spray effect graphic with flock print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Starting from scratch and creating a world famous brand is no joke. Pay tribute to the founder of lee, Henry David lee, in this blue t-shirt. The graphic print with a spray effect contouring the silhouette of Lee reaching the stars, and the flock print add to its stylish edge. Team this tee with jeans or shorts and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
